reasons: Natalia can threaten Lesley before Lesley reaches late-game poke comfort.
Lesley has limited self-peel if caught after Tactical Grenade or camouflage timing is forced.

proof.summary: Lesley wants distance and safe poke windows; Natalia can attack from unexpected angles and punish isolated positioning.
worksBestWhen: Natalia tracks Lesley's escape skill before committing.
Natalia attacks when Lesley is away from tank or support.
failureCases: Lesley groups tightly and uses frontline bodyguards.
Natalia engages after Lesley has already retreated behind turret or peel.

reasons: Saber can force a decisive all-in before Lesley's poke becomes overwhelming.
Lesley is vulnerable if she has already used Tactical Grenade or lacks nearby blockers.

proof.summary: Lesley survives through range, camouflage, and knockback; Saber can punish when those defensive tools are down or when she is isolated.
worksBestWhen: Saber waits for Tactical Grenade or camouflage to be unavailable.
Saber has enough burst to finish before Lesley can reposition.
failureCases: Saber dives into defensive support without enough follow-up.

reasons: Lolita can protect allies from Lesley's poke pattern and reduce the value of long-range harassment.
A strong frontline also helps body-block Lesley's Ultimate Snipe bullets.

proof.summary: Lesley wants clean shots onto fragile targets, while Lolita can stand between Lesley and the backline to deny clean target access.
worksBestWhen: Lolita positions directly between Lesley and the target Lesley wants to finish.
The team respects Lesley's ultimate line and does not scatter too far.
failureCases: Lesley flanks from an angle Lolita is not covering.
Lolita's shield or engage is used before Lesley commits poke.

reasons: Belerick can stand in Lesley's firing path and force her to spend shots into a tank.
His frontline presence makes it harder for Lesley to freely hit squishy heroes.

proof.summary: Lesley wants repeated high-value shots on fragile targets; Belerick can occupy the line of fire and force less efficient target selection.
worksBestWhen: Belerick stays near Lesley's intended target instead of chasing too far.
The team uses Belerick's presence to walk forward safely.
failureCases: Lesley farms safely and hits late item timing.
Belerick is kited before reaching relevant position.

reasons: Brody can contest Lesley's gold lane with strong trading and burst pressure.
He can punish Lesley before her late-game crit poke becomes the main threat.

proof.summary: Lesley scales into long-range pick damage; Brody can pressure the lane earlier and delay her item comfort.
worksBestWhen: Brody wins lane tempo and converts it into turret or turtle pressure.
He avoids giving Lesley free farm after the early lane.
failureCases: Lesley survives lane without losing farm.
Brody misses early tempo and Lesley reaches late-game safely.
